title: CI/CT DO tradecraft v1.1; SAT enumeration + 12 analyst templates (BLUF, ACH, ICD-203)
public_claim: CI/CT DO tradecraft v1.1 is an unclassified method packet for converting a long-form counterterrorism and counterintelligence paper into analyst-ready tradecraft templates.
distinctive_mechanism: It combines Red Team, kill-chain, Diamond Model, ACH, ICD-203 language discipline, BLUF forms, and twelve analyst templates so operational tradecraft, analytic method, and public-safe portfolio framing remain distinct.
